structured.title: Microsoft Office Access Troubleshooting
structured.overview: The conversation centers on difficulty opening a PDF and related Microsoft 365 access issues. The participants discuss whether the file is trying to open in Word, whether it should be opened in the browser, and why OneDrive and desktop Office features are no longer available. They also mention an email from Paul Thompson about Microsoft ending free Office access for students, which explains the confusion around the online-only version. The discussion shifts briefly to checking an emailed PDF from Rachel and verifying whether it came through correctly.

apps_results.content:
**Diary entry summary for today:**

- Talked about issues opening a PDF/file, with confusion around whether it was trying to open in Word or in the browser.
- Discussed Microsoft 365/Copilot and the change away from free desktop Office apps for students, which caused some frustration.
- Mentioned OneDrive and not wanting to be forced into using it.
- There was also a brief side conversation about a Wembley/Portsmouth Edge event, including wearing the wrong top and needing a police officer nearby.

If you want, I can also turn this into a cleaner single journal entry in a more natural diary style.
